assumption: The omitted timestamp in 'the pack at also' is interpreted as 1:30 because it is the only unmentioned pack sequence between 0:41 and 1:35.

instructions.text: At 0:40 change center so the full fan of cards is visible; use a hard framing change.
The pack at 0:41 also uses the changed center.
Inferred omitted note: the pack at 1:30 needs its centering changed.
The pack/card sequence at 1:35 needs its centering changed.
The fan of cards at 1:48 needs its centering changed.
The pack/card sequence at 1:50 needs its centering changed.
At 1:58 return to the existing correct static center.
